basic_details.job_title: Oil India Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 49 Junior Technician, Junior Office Assistant, Junior Engineer Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Oil India Limited (OIL), a Maharatna PSU under Ministry of Petroleum & Natural Gas, Govt. of India
basic_details.post_name: Junior Technician, Junior Office Assistant, Junior Engineer etc.
basic_details.job_location: Field Headquarters, Duliajan, Assam (involves working in shifts in production & exploration areas of Assam & Arunachal Pradesh)
basic_details.short_information: Oil India Limited (OIL) has published the Special Recruitment Drive for Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) Notification 2026 on 08 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 49 backlog/shortfall PwBD vacancies in Grade III and Grade VII posts at Field Headquarters, Duliajan. Eligible PwBD candidates from Assam and Arunachal Pradesh holding the required qualifications are invited to apply online at www.oil-india.com. The application process will be active from 08 May 2026 to 08 June 2026. Candidates can access the official notification PDF and apply online link below.

age_limit.details: Age limit is calculated as on the crucial date i.e. 08-06-2026. PwBD candidates get 10 years relaxation over and above category-wise relaxation. | Additional relaxations are applicable for Ex-Servicemen (PwBD), OIL employees, Work Contract Labourers, and Apprentices as per company rules. Maximum age under any circumstance is subject to specific relaxations mentioned in the notification.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the crucial date i.e. 08-06-2026. Only candidates possessing the exact prescribed qualifications should apply. | Note: Trade/Diploma Apprentices of OIL who have completed training successfully will get additional age relaxation and preference as per rules.

selection_process: A General English & GK/Awareness + Questions on OIL 20
Selection will be done through a single stage Computer Based Test (CBT) followed by Document Verification. There is no interview.
Duration: 2 Hours 40 Minutes (including 40 minutes compensatory time for PwBD) Qualifying Marks: 40 marks out of 100 Negative Marking: No
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the OIL website. Candidates should upload recent photograph and signature. Keep a printout of the submitted application for future reference.
Documents to be Uploaded / Carried for Verification:
Recent coloured passport-size photograph and signature
Class 10 Admit Card / Pass Certificate / Marksheet (DOB proof)
Trade Certificate / Diploma Certificate as applicable
Apply Online at: https://www.oil-india.com (under Career at OIL → Current Openings)
important_instructions: Only PwBD candidates from Assam and Arunachal Pradesh are eligible. Candidates can apply for only one post. Scribe facility is available as per RPwD Act guidelines. Travel fare reimbursement (2nd class Rail/Bus) will be provided for appearing in CBT. All communications will be sent via email/SMS only. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. The decision of OIL Management will be final. Any dispute will be subject to the jurisdiction of Dibrugarh District Court only.

faq.question: Q1. What is Oil India Limited PwBD Special Recruitment Drive 2026?
faq.answer: Oil India Limited PwBD Special Recruitment Drive 2026 is a dedicated recruitment initiative under Advertisement No. HRAQ/REC‑WP‑B/26‑148 dated 08 May 2026 to fill 49 backlog and shortfall vacancies reserved for Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) in Grade III and Grade VII workperson posts at OIL’s Field Headquarters, Duliajan.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are announced under Oil India PwBD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The notification announces a total of 49 PwBD‑only vacancies across Junior Technician, Junior Office Assistant and Junior Engineer (Electrical) posts, with 45 posts in Grade III and 4 posts in Grade VII, classified as backlog/shortfall vacancies against the PwBD reservation.

faq.question: Q3. Which posts are available in the Oil India PwBD Special Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Posts include Junior Technician (Electronics Mechanic, Fitter, Instrument Mechanic, Surveyor), Junior Office Assistant, and Junior Engineer (Electrical), all to be filled at Oil India’s Field Headquarters, Duliajan, with job responsibilities in production, exploration and field operations in Assam and Arunachal Pradesh.

faq.question: Q4. What are the important dates for Oil India Limited PwBD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Online registration starts on 08 May 2026 from 14:00 hours and closes on 08 June 2026 at 23:59 hours, while the Computer Based Test (CBT) is tentatively scheduled for 12 July 2026, with 08 June 2026 as the crucial date for determining age, qualification and other eligibility.

faq.question: Q5. Who can apply for Oil India PwBD Special Recruitment Drive 2026?
faq.answer: Only Persons with Benchmark Disabilities who are domiciled in the states of Assam and Arunachal Pradesh and meet the prescribed educational and trade/technical qualifications for the respective post codes are eligible to apply under this special drive.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for Oil India PwBD posts?
faq.answer: Junior Technician posts require Class 10 pass plus an NCVT/SCVT Trade Certificate in the relevant trade (Electronics Mechanic, Fitter, Instrument Mechanic, Surveyor). Junior Office Assistant requires 10+2 plus a minimum 6‑month Diploma/Certificate in Computer Applications. Junior Engineer (Electrical) requires Class 10 plus a 3‑year Diploma in Electrical Engineering along with a valid Electrical Supervisor Competency Certificate for Parts 1, 2, 3 and 4.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for Oil India PwBD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit as on 08 June 2026 is 40 years for General PwBD candidates, 45 years for SC/ST PwBD and 43 years for OBC (NCL) PwBD candidates, with additional relaxations for eligible ex‑servicemen, apprentices, work‑charged labourers and OIL departmental candidates as per rules.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for Oil India Limited PwBD Special Recruitment Drive 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category under this special recruitment drive, and all eligible PwBD candidates can apply online free of cost through the official Oil India website.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process and exam pattern for Oil India PwBD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is based on a single Computer Based Test (CBT) of 100 marks followed by document verification, with three sections—General English & General Awareness including questions on OIL (20 marks), Reasoning and Numerical/Mental Ability (20 marks), and Domain/Technical Knowledge (60 marks); the test has no negative marking, includes compensatory time for PwBD candidates and requires a minimum of 40 marks out of 100 to qualify.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply online for Oil India Limited PwBD Special Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible PwBD candidates must visit the “Career at OIL → Current Openings” section on the official Oil India website, fill the online application form, upload scanned copies of their photograph, signature, educational and disability certificates and other required documents, and finally submit and print the application for use at the document verification stage.
